title: Search Keyword
gist: Light card: a statistical-publication landing fragment, not a research article. The body is mostly cookie-consent boilerplate; the only substantive content is a notice that the SNB released its 'Important monetary policy data' statistical update on 15 June 2026, with a link to the data portal.

insights.claim: The SNB published its 'Important monetary policy data' (GWD) statistical update on 15 June 2026, available via the SNB data portal.
insights.speaker: SNB Research
insights.so_what: Flags the release date of the SNB's key monetary-policy data series for anyone tracking Swiss data calendars; the page itself carries no figures or analysis.
